headline: Grand Theft Auto 6 Preorders Start Soon. The Boost for Take-Two Stock Has Been Years in the Making.
summary: The long and tumultuous wait for Grand Theft Auto VI, the latest installment in the satirical, hyperviolent videogame series, is almost over.  Preorders for GTA VI will begin Thursday, June 25 ahead of the game’s official release in November, publisher Rockstar Games said Thursday.  GTA VI delays have become the stuff of legend.

headline: Locking in November: Take-Two rallies 4% as Rockstar sets GTA VI pre-order date
summary: Investing.com -- Take-Two Interactive Software (NASDAQ:TTWO) shares climbed 4% Thursday, as Wall Street cheered concrete confirmation that the entertainment industry’s most anticipated release is officially moving into its commercial phase. The rally followed an announcement from subsidiary Rockstar Games on X stating that digital and retail pre-orders for Grand Theft Auto VI will formally go live on June 25.
